## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Standardize chart themes, legends, axes, and tooltip behaviors
- Create wrappers for line, area, bar, and donut charts
- Use mock datasets for all chart examples
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Chart palette restricted to approved token set
  - Tooltip card surface #111827 with border #1F2937
  - Axis labels minimum 12px and readable on mobile

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Reusable chart wrappers created
- [ ] Chart styles consistent across pages
- [ ] Mock data examples included
- [ ] PR includes screenshots for each chart type

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `data-viz`, `design-system`, `priority-medium`
